skill-creator.description: Anthropic's official skill-authoring meta-skill — create, modify, eval, and benchmark skills; optimize descriptions for triggering accuracy. Replaces ai-kit's former `new-skill`.

new-agent.description: Meta-skill: create a new agent conforming to ai-kit conventions (frontmatter, role statement, minimal tools, Never/Procedures sections).

docs.description: Documentation standard: Diátaxis content model, ADR + changelog workflows, proportional bootstrap (docs setup). Pairs with the docs-auditor agent for heavy audit/migration.

docs-auditor.description: Read-only documentation audit/migration planner. Explicit invocation only.
